summary: The investigation identified multiple indicators of compromise including a suspicious executable download, persistence mechanism via a service, and unauthorized hosts file modification. The activity suggests a malware infection chain. Coverage: Filesystem=YES; Registry=NO; EventLogs=NO;

artifacts.name: SysInternals.exe
artifacts.description: Suspicious executable found in public downloads directory.
artifacts.recommended_validation: Verify file hash against known good repositories and perform static analysis.

artifacts.name: Malicious Download URL
artifacts.description: External URL associated with malicious file download.
artifacts.recommended_validation: Check firewall logs for connection attempts and block domain.

artifacts.name: vmtoolsIO.exe
artifacts.description: Suspicious executable located in Windows directory.
artifacts.recommended_validation: Check file signature and perform behavioral analysis.

artifacts.name: VMwareIOHelperService
artifacts.recommended_validation: Inspect service configuration and associated binary path.

artifacts.name: Hosts File Modification
artifacts.description: Unauthorized modification of hosts file to redirect traffic.
artifacts.recommended_validation: Review hosts file content and check for unauthorized changes.
